title: pyrrosia kinabaluensis
intro: Pyrrosia kinabaluensis, also known as Kinabalu Pteris or Kinabalu Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Borneo and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and has been traditionally used to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Pyrrosia kinabaluensis is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices, and may be dried and powdered for later use in traditional remedies.
